details.productUrlName: Firja Judge of Valor Serial Numbered

customAttributes.description:
Flying, lifelink
Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 4/21/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: Invader after invader fell before her, and to each she spoke a single word: "Unworthy."
